content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: hdr_override:sess_only->spoof(x-user-id) ⇒ "public_api_gateway;hdr_override;authz_bypass"
P: drop_hdr → sess_only → 401
V: "req x-user-id ignored/denied" ∧ "401 on empty userId"
R: ! spoof(x-user-id) ∧ ! authz_bypass
A: "mitigate:drop_hdr;trust_sess"

[AUDIT]
Treat hdr override:sess only->spoof(x-user-id) as a header auth risk, apply drop the header path, and verify spoofed requests fail.
